name: Zooika
short_description: The cutest, most chaotic physics-based suika game! Pop your way to the top with friends, viewers, and very stubborn watermelons!
detailed_description:
Drop, Pop, MERGE! Can you master the chaos?

Welcome to Zooika, where bouncy physics meets adorable animals! Drop critters into the box and merge two of the same kind to create bigger, even cuter creatures. But beware: those watermelons are notoriously stubborn!

Easy to learn but tough to master, Zooika is a popping-good puzzle challenge. Strategize your drops, chain combinations for huge scores, and climb the global leaderboards!

Key Features:

  • Chaotic & Cute: Enjoy vibrant visuals, bouncy physics, and a whole zoo of charming animals to discover.

  • Endless Replayability: Multiple animal sets and unique play areas offer fresh challenges every time you play.

  • Leaderboards: Compete for high scores and challenge your friends to beat your best!

  • Advanced Twitch Integration: The ultimate streamer experience! Let your viewers vote to help or sabotage your run with power-ups and chaos. Or, take a break and let chat play for themselves!

Welcome to the Pop-tastic Puzzle Party!

Zooika takes the satisfying "merge" genre and fills it with personality, challenge, and friendly competition. It’s the perfect game for a quick session or an hours-long high-score chase.

Merge Your Way to the Top

The rules are simple: drop animals, merge matching pairs, and avoid filling the box! But mastery requires strategy. Plan your drops carefully to create chain reactions and maximize your score with multipliers and bonus points. Do you have what it takes to reach the top of the leaderboard?

More Ways to Play

Zooika goes beyond the basics! Experiment with multiple animal sets, each with its own unique feel, round or square or both! Discover new play areas that change how you think about your strategy, keeping the gameplay exciting and new.

The Ultimate Streamer Tool: Twitch Integrations

Turn your stream into an interactive party! Battle against your viewers as they directly influence your game.

  • Need Help? Kind viewers might send mice to clear space or pop rabbits to save you from game over.

  • Like Chaos? They can rain down endless watermelons, flip the screen upside down, or trigger other hilarious obstacles.

  • Hands-Free Mode: Want a break? Let your chat take control and play Zooika all by themselves!

Ready to Pop?

Play Zooika today and get ready for a uniquely charming and challenging puzzle experience!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Welsh
